history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. A safe path to the goal at row 04 column D is to go down through row 03, so I should first turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward brings me closer while avoiding the lava at row 02 column C and row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward now advances safely toward the row of the goal while avoiding lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell in front of me would be row 05 column B, which is a wall, so I should not move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D. A safe path is to go up through row 03 column B, then across to row 03 columns C and D, then down to the goal, avoiding lava at row 04 column C. First I need to face up, so I should turn around. The first step is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing left. The cell in front of me at row 04 column A is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The goal is at row 04 column D, but row 04 column C is lava, so I must go around through the upper safe cells. A good route is to turn right to face up and move toward row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The goal is at row 04 column D, but row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot go directly right across. A safe route is to go up to row 03 column B, then right across row 03 to column D, then down to the goal. The next safe step is to move forward into row 03 column B.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell in front of me is row 02 column B, which is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and I will need to navigate around the lava at row 04 column C. Moving forward into row 02 column B is safe and keeps me in open space to continue repositioning toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell directly ahead at row 01 column B is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The goal is at row 04 column D. A safe route is to go down through row 03 and then right toward the goal, so I should first turn to face right or left; turning right is a good first step.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. A safe path to the goal at row 04 column D is to go down through row 03. To do that, I should first face downward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward is a safe first step that brings me closer while avoiding the lava at row 02 column C and row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column B is a safe floor cell. The goal is at row 04 column D, and moving forward brings me closer while avoiding the lava at row 04 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing down. The cell directly ahead is row 05 column B, which is a wall, so moving forward is not possible. The goal is at row 04 column D, but row 04 column C is lava, so I should go around through row 03. First, I need to face right to move toward the safe path via row 03 column B, so I should turn left from facing down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The goal is at row 04 column D, and a safe path is to go up through row 03, move right, then go down to the goal. First, I should turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, while the cell to the right at row 04 column C is lava, so I should avoid turning toward it. Moving forward brings me closer to a safe path toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell in front of me is row 02 column B, which is a safe floor cell. Moving there brings me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava at column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
